Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me compile a comprehensive report. ## Summary of Findings I have thoroughly explored the MAS (Merchandising and Subscription) codebase and identified the Photoshop Plans page files and CTA (Call-to-Action) elements. Here are my findings: ### 1. **Photoshop Plans Page Files** **Primary Files:** - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-photoshop.json` - Test fragment for Photoshop CCD product card - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/nala/studio/acom/plans/plans.page.js` - Page object for Photoshop plans card testing - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/nala/docs/acom/plans.page.js` - Page object for plans documentation **Related Test/Spec Files:** - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/nala/studio/acom/plans/individuals/` - Individual plans tests and specs ### 2. **CTA (Call-to-Action) Elements** **In fragment-photoshop.json (Line 21-24):** ```json "ctas": { "value": "

Buy now

", "mimeType": "text/html" } ``` **CTA Text Examples Found:** - "Buy now" - Primary purchase CTA - "Free trial" - Trial CTA (used in some variants) - "Get Offer" - Alternative CTA text in badge variant - "Select" - Plan selection CTA in collection variants ### 3. **Key Web Components for CTAs** **Checkout Link Component:** - File: `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/src/checkout-link.js` - Custom element: `` - Attributes: data-checkout-workflow, data-checkout-workflow-step, data-wcs-osi, data-promotion-code, data-quantity **Plans Variant Layout:** - File: `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/src/variants/plans.js` (Line 43) - CTA Mapping: `ctas: { slot: 'footer', size: 'm' }` - Rendered in footer slot via `` - Base layout in `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/src/variants/variant-layout.js` (Line 115-119) ### 4. **CSS/Style Files for CTAs** **Plans CSS Styling:** - File: `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js` - Line 227-230: Footer anchor styling ```css merch-card[variant^="plans"] [slot="footer"] a { line-height: 19px; padding: 3px 16px 4px; } ``` - Line 232-234: Button span styling ```css merch-card[variant^="plans"] [slot="footer"] .con-button > span { min-width: unset; } ``` **Related CSS Files:** - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/src/variants/ah-promoted-plans.css.js` - Promoted plans CTA styling (Line 52-70) - `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/src/variants/full-pricing-express.css.js` - Express variant CTA styling (Line 404-443) ### 5. **Plans Page Component Mapping** **AEM Fragment Mapping (plans.js, Line 12-46):** - cardName, title, subtitle, prices, descriptions - CTAs mapped to footer slot with medium size - Badge, callout, quantity select, and addon support - Multiple variants: plans, plans-education, plans-students ### 6. **Test Data and Mock Fragments** Multiple fragment variants in `/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/7f77edee/web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/`: - fragment-photoshop.json - fragment-photography-plans.json - fragment-individual-plans-collection.json - fragment-individual-plans-wide-reflow.json - fragment-cc-all-apps.json (with CTA "Buy now") - fragment-acrobat.json (with CTA "Buy now") All follow the same CTA structure with `checkout-link` custom element and data attributes for workflow tracking. This structure enables the feature branch task: **feat-13-remove-ctas-photoshop-plans-page** - which would likely involve removing or hiding the `"ctas"` field from the Photoshop plans fragment or filtering CTAs at the component level.
